nasb.text: Then Joshua said, “Open the mouth of the cave and bring these five kings out to me from the cave.”

esv.text: Then Joshua said, “Open the mouth of the cave and bring those five kings out to me from the cave.”

cnv.text: 約書亞說：“你們打開洞口，把那五個王從洞裡拉出來，帶到我這裡來。”

ccb.text: 约书亚说：“打开洞口，把里面的五个王押出来见我。”
